summary.en-US: Get a link to the moment you were subgifted.

description.en-US:
Do you sometime get a Twitch subgift while you are not watching the channel ?
Do you wonder how it happened and how the streamer reacted ?
This extension allows you to jump to the exact moment it happened.
Usage:
- On Twitch, open the notification window
- Scroll down until you see the subgift notification
- Click on the action button in the address bar
- If the broadcast replay is available, you will be able to click and jump to the exact timecode of the subgift
